001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ObjectUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
025import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
026import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.XmlSerializerSession.ContentResult.*;
027
028import java.io.*;
029import java.time.*;
030import java.time.temporal.*;
031import java.util.*;
032import java.util.function.*;
033import java.util.regex.*;
034
035import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
040import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
041
042/**
043 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link HtmlSerializer}.
044 *
045 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
046 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
047 * </ul>
048 *
049 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
050 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlSupport">HTML Basics</a>
051
052 * </ul>
053 */
054@SuppressWarnings({
055   "resource",   // Resource management handled externally
056   "rawtypes",   // Raw types necessary for generic type handling throughout HTML serializer session
057   "unchecked",  // Type erasure requires unchecked casts throughout HTML serializer session
058   "java:S110",  // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
059   "java:S115",  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
060   "java:S6541"  // Brain method acceptable for serializeAnything; refactoring would reduce clarity
061})
062public class HtmlSerializerSession extends XmlSerializerSession {
063
064   // Property name constants
065   private static final String PROP_addKeyValueTableHeaders = "addKeyValueTableHeaders";
066   private static final String PROP_detectLabelParameters = "detectLabelParameters";
067   private static final String PROP_detectLinksInStrings = "detectLinksInStrings";
068   private static final String PROP_labelParameter = "labelParameter";
069   private static final String PROP_uriAnchorText = "uriAnchorText";
070   private static final String PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_addKeyValueTableHeaders = "HtmlSerializerSession.addKeyValueTableHeaders";
071   private static final String PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_detectLabelParameters = "HtmlSerializerSession.detectLabelParameters";
072   private static final String PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_detectLinksInStrings = "HtmlSerializerSession.detectLinksInStrings";
073   private static final String PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_labelParameter = "HtmlSerializerSession.labelParameter";
074   private static final String PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_uriAnchorText = "HtmlSerializerSession.uriAnchorText";
075
076   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
077   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
078
079   // HTML tag name constants
080   private static final String TAG_style = "style";
081   private static final String TAG_table = "table";
082   private static final String TAG_array = "array";
083   private static final String CONST_string = "string";
084
085   /**
086    * Builder class.
087    */
088   @SuppressWarnings({
089      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
090   })
091   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends XmlSerializerSession.Builder<SELF> {
092
093      private boolean addKeyValueTableHeaders;
094      private boolean detectLabelParameters;
095      private boolean detectLinksInStrings;
096      private String labelParameter;
097      private AnchorText uriAnchorText;
098      private HtmlSerializer ctx;
099
100      /**
101       * Constructor
102       *
103       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
104       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
105       */
106      protected Builder(HtmlSerializer ctx) {
107         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
108         this.ctx = ctx;
109         addKeyValueTableHeaders = ctx.isAddKeyValueTableHeaders();
110         detectLabelParameters = ctx.isDetectLabelParameters();
111         detectLinksInStrings = ctx.isDetectLinksInStrings();
112         labelParameter = ctx.getLabelParameter();
113         uriAnchorText = ctx.getUriAnchorText();
114      }
115
116      @Override
117      public HtmlSerializerSession build() {
118         return new HtmlSerializerSession(this);
119      }
120
121      /**
122       * Add key/value headers on bean/map tables.
123       *
124       * @param value The new value for this setting.
125       * @return This object.
126       */
127      public SELF addKeyValueTableHeaders(boolean value) {
128         addKeyValueTableHeaders = value;
129         return self();
130      }
131
132      /**
133       * Look for link labels in URIs.
134       *
135       * @param value The new value for this setting.
136       * @return This object.
137       */
138      public SELF detectLabelParameters(boolean value) {
139         detectLabelParameters = value;
140         return self();
141      }
142
143      /**
144       * Look for URLs in Strings.
145       *
146       * @param value The new value for this setting.
147       * @return This object.
148       */
149      public SELF detectLinksInStrings(boolean value) {
150         detectLinksInStrings = value;
151         return self();
152      }
153
154      /**
155       * The label parameter name.
156       *
157       * @param value The new value for this setting.
158       * @return This object.
159       */
160      public SELF labelParameter(String value) {
161         labelParameter = value;
162         return self();
163      }
164
165      /**
166       * The anchor text to use for URL objects.
167       *
168       * @param value The new value for this setting.
169       * @return This object.
170       */
171      public SELF uriAnchorText(AnchorText value) {
172         uriAnchorText = value;
173         return self();
174      }
175
176      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
177      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
178         if (key == null) { super.property(key, value); return self(); }
179         switch (key) {
180            case PROP_addKeyValueTableHeaders, PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_addKeyValueTableHeaders:
181               return addKeyValueTableHeaders(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
182            case PROP_detectLabelParameters, PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_detectLabelParameters:
183               return detectLabelParameters(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
184            case PROP_detectLinksInStrings, PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_detectLinksInStrings:
185               return detectLinksInStrings(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
186            case PROP_labelParameter, PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_labelParameter:
187               return labelParameter(cvt(value, String.class));
188            case PROP_uriAnchorText, PROP_HtmlSerializerSession_uriAnchorText:
189               return uriAnchorText(cvt(value, AnchorText.class));
190            default:
191               super.property(key, value);
192               return self();
193         }
194      }
195
196   }
197
198   /**
199    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
200    */
201   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
202
203      DefaultBuilder(HtmlSerializer ctx) {
204         super(ctx);
205      }
206   }
207
208   /**
209    * Creates a new builder for this object.
210    *
211    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
212    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
213    * @return A new builder.
214    */
215   @SuppressWarnings({
216      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
217   })
218   public static Builder<?> create(HtmlSerializer ctx) {
219      return new DefaultBuilder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
220   }
221
222   private final HtmlSerializer ctx;
223   private final boolean addKeyValueTableHeaders;
224   private final boolean detectLabelParameters;
225   private final boolean detectLinksInStrings;
226   private final String labelParameter;
227   private final AnchorText uriAnchorText;
228   private final Pattern labelPattern;
229
230   /**
231    * Constructor.
232    *
233    * @param builder The builder for this object.
234    */
235   protected HtmlSerializerSession(Builder<?> builder) {
236      super(builder);
237      ctx = builder.ctx;
238      addKeyValueTableHeaders = builder.addKeyValueTableHeaders;
239      detectLabelParameters = builder.detectLabelParameters;
240      detectLinksInStrings = builder.detectLinksInStrings;
241      labelParameter = builder.labelParameter;
242      uriAnchorText = builder.uriAnchorText;
243      labelPattern = Pattern.compile("[\\?\\&]" + Pattern.quote(labelParameter) + "=([^\\&]*)");
244   }
245
246   /**
247    * Returns the anchor text to use for the specified URL object.
248    *
249    * @param pMeta
250    *    The property metadata of the bean property of the object.
251    *    Can be <jk>null</jk> if the object isn't from a bean property.
252    * @param o The URL object.
253    * @return The anchor text to use for the specified URL object.
254    */
255   public String getAnchorText(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, Object o) {
256      var s = o.toString();
257      if (isDetectLabelParameters()) {
258         Matcher m = labelPattern.matcher(s);
259         if (m.find())
260            return urlDecode(m.group(1));
261      }
262      return switch (getUriAnchorText()) {
263         case LAST_TOKEN -> {
264            s = resolveUri(s);
265            if (s.indexOf('/') != -1)
266               s = s.substring(s.lastIndexOf('/') + 1);
267            if (s.indexOf('?') != -1)
268               s = s.substring(0, s.indexOf('?'));
269            if (s.indexOf('#') != -1)
270               s = s.substring(0, s.indexOf('#'));
271            if (s.isEmpty())
272               s = "/";
273            yield urlDecode(s);
274         }
275         case URI_ANCHOR -> {
276            if (s.indexOf('#') != -1)
277               s = s.substring(s.lastIndexOf('#') + 1);
278            yield urlDecode(s);
279         }
280         case PROPERTY_NAME -> pMeta == null ? s : pMeta.getName();
281         case URI -> resolveUri(s);
282         case CONTEXT_RELATIVE -> relativizeUri("context:/", s);
283         case SERVLET_RELATIVE -> relativizeUri("servlet:/", s);
284         case PATH_RELATIVE -> relativizeUri("request:/", s);
285         default /* TO_STRING */ -> s;
286      };
287   }
288
289   @Override /* Overridden from XmlSerializer */
290   public boolean isHtmlMode() { return true; }
291
292   /**
293    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified object is a URL.
294    *
295    * @param cm The ClassMeta of the object being serialized.
296    * @param pMeta
297    *    The property metadata of the bean property of the object.
298    *    Can be <jk>null</jk> if the object isn't from a bean property.
299    * @param o The object.
300    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified object is a URL.
301    */
302   public boolean isUri(ClassMeta<?> cm, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, Object o) {
303      return (cm.isUri() || (nn(pMeta) && pMeta.isUri()))
304         || (isDetectLinksInStrings() && o instanceof CharSequence && isHttpUrl(o.toString()));
305   }
306
307   // Programmatic equivalent of the full match https?\:\/\/.* (Pattern.matcher(s).matches()).
308   // The trailing .* does not cross a line terminator under matches(), so the remainder must contain none.
309   private static boolean isHttpUrl(String s) {
310      int start;
311      if (s.startsWith("http://"))
312         start = 7;
313      else if (s.startsWith("https://"))
314         start = 8;
315      else
316         return false;
317      for (var i = start; i < s.length(); i++) {
318         var c = s.charAt(i);
319         if (c == '\n' || c == '\r' || c == '\u0085' || c == '\u2028' || c == '\u2029')
320            return false;
321      }
322      return true;
323   }
324
325   /**
326    * Main serialization routine.
327    *
328    * @param session The serialization context object.
329    * @param o The object being serialized.
330    * @param w The writer to serialize to.
331    * @return The same writer passed in.
332    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred trying to send output to the writer.
333    */
334   private XmlWriter doSerialize(Object o, XmlWriter w) throws SerializeException {
335      serializeAnything(w, o, getExpectedRootType(o), null, null, getInitialDepth() - 1, true, false);
336      return w;
337   }
338
339   private String getAnchorText(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) {
340      return pMeta == null ? null : getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getAnchorText();
341   }
342
343   private String getLink(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) {
344      return pMeta == null ? null : getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getLink();
345   }
346
347   private HtmlRender<?> getRender(HtmlSerializerSession session, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, Object value) {
348      if (pMeta == null)
349         return null;
350      HtmlRender<?> render = getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getRender();
351      if (nn(render))
352         return render;
353      var cMeta = session.getClassMetaForObject(value);
354      render = cMeta == null ? null : getHtmlClassMeta(cMeta).getRender();
355      return render;
356   }
357
358   
359   private String getStyle(HtmlSerializerSession session, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, Object value) {
360      // Check for annotation style first
361      if (nn(pMeta)) {
362         String annotationStyle = getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getStyle();
363         if (nn(annotationStyle))
364            return annotationStyle;
365      }
366      // Fall back to render
367      HtmlRender render = getRender(session, pMeta, value);
368      return render == null ? null : render.getStyle(session, value);
369   }
370
371   /*
372    * Returns the table column headers for the specified collection of objects.
373    * Returns null if collection should not be serialized as a 2-dimensional table.
374    * Returns an empty array if it should be treated as a table but without headers.
375    * 2-dimensional tables are used for collections of objects that all have the same set of property names.
376    *
377    * Null vs empty array have distinct semantics here (don't use table vs table with no headers).
378    * Consider Optional or separate method to avoid null return.
379    */
380   @SuppressWarnings({
381      "java:S1168",     // Null vs empty array have distinct semantics (don't use table vs table with no headers)
382      "java:S3776"      // Cognitive complexity acceptable for table header resolution
383   })
384   private Object[] getTableHeaders(Collection c, HtmlBeanPropertyMeta bpHtml) throws SerializeException {
385
386      if (c.isEmpty())
387         return null;
388
389      c = sort(c);
390
391      Object o1 = null;
392      for (var o : c)
393         if (nn(o)) {
394            o1 = o;
395            break;
396         }
397      if (o1 == null)
398         return null;
399
400      var cm1 = getClassMetaForObject(o1);
401
402      ObjectSwap swap = cm1.getSwap(this);
403      o1 = swap(swap, o1);
404      if (nn(swap))
405         cm1 = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
406
407      if (cm1 == null || ! cm1.isMapOrBean() || getAnnotationProvider().has(HtmlLink.class, cm1))
408         return null;
409
410      HtmlClassMeta cHtml = getHtmlClassMeta(cm1);
411
412      if (cHtml.isNoTables() || bpHtml.isNoTables() || cHtml.isXml() || bpHtml.isXml() || canIgnoreValue(cm1, null, o1))
413         return null;
414
415      if (cHtml.isNoTableHeaders() || bpHtml.isNoTableHeaders())
416         return new Object[0];
417
418      // If it's a non-bean map, only use table if all entries are also maps.
419      if (cm1.isMap() && ! cm1.isBeanMap()) {
420
421         Set<Object> set = set();
422         for (var o : c) {
423            o = swap(swap, o);
424            if (! canIgnoreValue(cm1, null, o)) {
425               if (! cm1.isInstance(o))
426                  return null;
427               forEachEntry((Map)o, x -> set.add(x.getKey()));
428            }
429         }
430         return set.toArray(new Object[set.size()]);
431      }
432
433      // Must be a bean or BeanMap.
434      for (var o : c) {
435         o = swap(swap, o);
436         if (! canIgnoreValue(cm1, null, o) && ! cm1.isInstance(o))
437            return null;
438      }
439
440      BeanMap<?> bm = toBeanMap(o1);
441      return bm.keySet().toArray(new String[bm.size()]);
442   }
443
444   @SuppressWarnings({
445      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for bean map serialization
446   })
447   private void serializeBeanMap(XmlWriter out, BeanMap<?> m, ClassMeta<?> eType, BeanPropertyMeta ppMeta) throws SerializeException {
448
449      var mcm = (ClassMeta<?>) m.getBeanInfo();
450      HtmlClassMeta cHtml = getHtmlClassMeta(mcm);
451      HtmlBeanPropertyMeta bpHtml = getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(ppMeta);
452
453      int i = indent;
454
455      out.oTag(i, TAG_table);
456
457      String typeName = m.getMeta().getDictionaryName();
458      if (nn(typeName) && eType != mcm)
459         out.attr(getBeanTypePropertyName(mcm), typeName);
460
461      out.w('>').nl(i);
462      if (isAddKeyValueTableHeaders() && ! (cHtml.isNoTableHeaders() || bpHtml.isNoTableHeaders())) {
463         out.sTag(i + 1, "tr").nl(i + 1);
464         out.sTag(i + 2, "th").append("key").eTag("th").nl(i + 2);
465         out.sTag(i + 2, "th").append("value").eTag("th").nl(i + 2);
466         out.ie(i + 1).eTag("tr").nl(i + 1);
467      }
468
469      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
470
471      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
472         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
473
474         if (nn(thrown))
475            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
476
477         if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
478            return;
479
480         String link = null;
481         String anchorText = null;
482         if (! cMeta.isCollectionOrArray()) {
483            link = m.resolveVars(getLink(pMeta));
484            anchorText = m.resolveVars(getAnchorText(pMeta));
485         }
486
487         if (nn(anchorText))
488            value = anchorText;
489
490         out.sTag(i + 1, "tr").nl(i + 1);
491         out.sTag(i + 2, "td").text(key).eTag("td").nl(i + 2);
492         out.oTag(i + 2, "td");
493         String style = getStyle(this, pMeta, value);
494         if (nn(style))
495            out.attr(TAG_style, style);
496         out.cTag();
497
498         try {
499            if (nn(link))
500               out.oTag(i + 3, "a").attrUri("href", link).cTag();
501            ContentResult cr = serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, pMeta, 2, false, true);
502            if (cr == CR_ELEMENTS)
503               out.i(i + 2);
504            if (nn(link))
505               out.eTag("a");
506         } catch (SerializeException e) {
507            throw e;
508         } catch (Exception e) {
509            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, e);
510         }
511         out.eTag("td").nl(i + 2);
512         out.ie(i + 1).eTag("tr").nl(i + 1);
513      });
514
515      out.ie(i).eTag(TAG_table).nl(i);
516   }
517
518   
519   @SuppressWarnings({
520      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
521      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
522   })
523   private void serializeCollection(XmlWriter out, Object in, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eType, String name, BeanPropertyMeta ppMeta) throws SerializeException {
524
525      HtmlClassMeta cHtml = getHtmlClassMeta(sType);
526      HtmlBeanPropertyMeta bpHtml = getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(ppMeta);
527
528      Collection c = (sType.isCollection() ? (Collection)in : toList(sType.inner(), in));
529
530      boolean isCdc = cHtml.isHtmlCdc() || bpHtml.isHtmlCdc();
531      boolean isSdc = cHtml.isHtmlSdc() || bpHtml.isHtmlSdc();
532      boolean isDc = isCdc || isSdc;
533
534      int i = indent;
535      if (c.isEmpty()) {
536         out.appendln(i, "<ul></ul>");
537         return;
538      }
539
540      String type2 = null;
541      if (sType != eType)
542         type2 = sType.getBeanDictionaryName();
543      if (type2 == null)
544         type2 = TAG_array;
545
546      c = sort(c);
547
548      String btpn = getBeanTypePropertyName(eType);
549
550      // Look at the objects to see how we're going to handle them.  Check the first object to see how we're going to
551      // handle this.
552      // If it's a map or bean, then we'll create a table.
553      // Otherwise, we'll create a list.
554      Object[] th = getTableHeaders(c, bpHtml);
555
556      if (nn(th)) {
557
558         out.oTag(i, TAG_table).attr(btpn, type2).w('>').nl(i + 1);
559         if (th.length > 0) {
560            out.sTag(i + 1, "tr").nl(i + 2);
561            for (var key : th) {
562               out.sTag(i + 2, "th");
563               out.text(convertToType(key, String.class));
564               out.eTag("th").nl(i + 2);
565            }
566            out.ie(i + 1).eTag("tr").nl(i + 1);
567         } else {
568            th = null;
569         }
570
571         for (var o : c) {
572            var cm = getClassMetaForObject(o);
573
574            if (nn(cm) && nn(cm.getSwap(this))) {
575               ObjectSwap swap = cm.getSwap(this);
576               o = swap(swap, o);
577               cm = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
578            }
579
580            out.oTag(i + 1, "tr");
581            String typeName = (cm == null ? null : cm.getBeanDictionaryName());
582            String typeProperty = getBeanTypePropertyName(cm);
583
584            if (nn(typeName) && eType.getElementType() != cm)
585               out.attr(typeProperty, typeName);
586            out.cTag().nl(i + 2);
587
588            if (cm == null) {
589               out.i(i + 2);
590               serializeAnything(out, o, null, null, null, 1, false, false);
591               out.nl(0);
592
593            } else if (cm.isMap() && ! (cm.isBeanMap())) {
594               Map m2 = sort((Map)o);
595
596               if (th == null)
597                  th = m2.keySet().toArray(new Object[m2.size()]);
598
599               for (var k : th) {
600                  out.sTag(i + 2, "td");
601                  ContentResult cr = serializeAnything(out, m2.get(k), eType.getElementType(), toString(k), null, 2, false, true);
602                  if (cr == CR_ELEMENTS)
603                     out.i(i + 2);
604                  out.eTag("td").nl(i + 2);
605               }
606            } else {
607               BeanMap m2 = toBeanMap(o);
608
609               if (th == null)
610                  th = m2.keySet().toArray(new Object[m2.size()]);
611
612               for (var k : th) {
613                  BeanMapEntry p = m2.getProperty(toString(k));
614                  BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = p.getMeta();
615                  if (pMeta.canRead()) {
616                     Object value = p.getValue();
617
618                     String link = null;
619                     String anchorText = null;
620                     if (! pMeta.getBeanInfo().isCollectionOrArray()) {
621                        link = m2.resolveVars(getLink(pMeta));
622                        anchorText = m2.resolveVars(getAnchorText(pMeta));
623                     }
624
625                     if (nn(anchorText))
626                        value = anchorText;
627
628                     String style = getStyle(this, pMeta, value);
629                     out.oTag(i + 2, "td");
630                     if (nn(style))
631                        out.attr(TAG_style, style);
632                     out.cTag();
633                     if (nn(link))
634                        out.oTag("a").attrUri("href", link).cTag();
635                     ContentResult cr = serializeAnything(out, value, (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo(), p.getKey(), pMeta, 2, false, true);
636                     if (cr == CR_ELEMENTS)
637                        out.i(i + 2);
638                     if (nn(link))
639                        out.eTag("a");
640                     out.eTag("td").nl(i + 2);
641                  }
642               }
643            }
644            out.ie(i + 1).eTag("tr").nl(i + 1);
645         }
646         out.ie(i).eTag(TAG_table).nl(i);
647
648      } else {
649         out.oTag(i, isDc ? "p" : "ul");
650         if (! type2.equals(TAG_array))
651            out.attr(btpn, type2);
652         out.w('>').nl(i + 1);
653         var isFirst = true;
654         for (var o : c) {
655            if (isDc && ! isFirst)
656               out.append(isCdc ? ", " : " ");
657            if (! isDc)
658               out.oTag(i + 1, "li");
659            String style = getStyle(this, ppMeta, o);
660            String link = getLink(ppMeta);
661            if (nn(style) && ! isDc)
662               out.attr(TAG_style, style);
663            if (! isDc)
664               out.cTag();
665            if (nn(link))
666               out.oTag(i + 2, "a").attrUri("href", link.replace("{#}", s(o))).cTag();
667            ContentResult cr = serializeAnything(out, o, eType.getElementType(), name, null, 1, false, true);
668            if (nn(link))
669               out.eTag("a");
670            if (cr == CR_ELEMENTS)
671               out.ie(i + 1);
672            if (! isDc)
673               out.eTag("li").nl(i + 1);
674            isFirst = false;
675         }
676         out.ie(i).eTag(isDc ? "p" : "ul").nl(i);
677      }
678   }
679
680   
681   private void serializeMap(XmlWriter out, Map m, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eKeyType, ClassMeta<?> eValueType, String typeName, BeanPropertyMeta ppMeta) throws SerializeException {
682
683      var keyType = eKeyType == null ? string() : eKeyType;
684      var valueType = eValueType == null ? object() : eValueType;
685      var aType = getClassMetaForObject(m);       // The actual type
686      HtmlClassMeta cHtml = getHtmlClassMeta(aType);
687      HtmlBeanPropertyMeta bpHtml = getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(ppMeta);
688
689      int i = indent;
690
691      out.oTag(i, TAG_table);
692
693      if (nn(typeName) && nn(ppMeta) && ppMeta.getBeanInfo() != aType)
694         out.attr(getBeanTypePropertyName(sType), typeName);
695
696      out.append(">").nl(i + 1);
697      if (isAddKeyValueTableHeaders() && ! (cHtml.isNoTableHeaders() || bpHtml.isNoTableHeaders())) {
698         out.sTag(i + 1, "tr").nl(i + 2);
699         out.sTag(i + 2, "th").append("key").eTag("th").nl(i + 3);
700         out.sTag(i + 2, "th").append("value").eTag("th").nl(i + 3);
701         out.ie(i + 1).eTag("tr").nl(i + 2);
702      }
703
704      forEachEntry(m, x -> serializeMapEntry(out, x, keyType, valueType, i, ppMeta));
705
706      out.ie(i).eTag(TAG_table).nl(i);
707   }
708
709   private void serializeMapEntry(XmlWriter out, Map.Entry e, ClassMeta<?> keyType, ClassMeta<?> valueType, int i, BeanPropertyMeta ppMeta) throws SerializeException {
710      Object key = generalize(e.getKey(), keyType);
711      Object value = null;
712      try {
713         value = e.getValue();
714      } catch (StackOverflowError t) {
715         throw t;
716      } catch (Exception t) {
717         onError(t, "Could not call getValue() on property ''{0}'', {1}", e.getKey(), localizedMessage(t));
718      }
719
720      String link = getLink(ppMeta);
721      String style = getStyle(this, ppMeta, value);
722
723      out.sTag(i + 1, "tr").nl(i + 2);
724      out.oTag(i + 2, "td");
725      if (nn(style))
726         out.attr(TAG_style, style);
727      out.cTag();
728      if (nn(link))
729         out.oTag(i + 3, "a").attrUri("href", link.replace("{#}", s(value))).cTag();
730      ContentResult cr = serializeAnything(out, key, keyType, null, null, 2, false, false);
731      if (nn(link))
732         out.eTag("a");
733      if (cr == CR_ELEMENTS)
734         out.i(i + 2);
735      out.eTag("td").nl(i + 2);
736      out.sTag(i + 2, "td");
737      cr = serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, (key == null ? "_x0000_" : toString(key)), null, 2, false, true);
738      if (cr == CR_ELEMENTS)
739         out.ie(i + 2);
740      out.eTag("td").nl(i + 2);
741      out.ie(i + 1).eTag("tr").nl(i + 1);
742
743   }
744
745   @Override /* Overridden from Serializer */
746   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
747      doSerialize(o, getHtmlWriter(out));
748   }
749
750   /**
751    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
752    *
753    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
754    * @return The metadata.
755    */
756   protected HtmlBeanPropertyMeta getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
757      return ctx.getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
758   }
759
760   /**
761    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
762    *
763    * @param cm The class to return the metadata on.
764    * @return The metadata.
765    */
766   protected HtmlClassMeta getHtmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
767      return ctx.getHtmlClassMeta(cm);
768   }
769
770   /**
771    * Converts the specified output target object to an {@link HtmlWriter}.
772    *
773    * @param out The output target object.
774    * @return The output target object wrapped in an {@link HtmlWriter}.
775    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
776    */
777   protected final HtmlWriter getHtmlWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
778      Object output = out.getRawOutput();
779      if (output instanceof HtmlWriter output2)
780         return output2;
781      var w = new HtmlWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isTrimStrings(), getQuoteChar(), getUriResolver());
782      out.setWriter(w);
783      return w;
784   }
785
786   /**
787    * Link label parameter name.
788    *
789    * @see HtmlSerializer.Builder#labelParameter(String)
790    * @return
791    *    The parameter name to look for when resolving link labels.
792    */
793   protected final String getLabelParameter() { return labelParameter; }
794
795   /**
796    * Anchor text source.
797    *
798    * @see HtmlSerializer.Builder#uriAnchorText(AnchorText)
799    * @return
800    *    When creating anchor tags (e.g. <code><xt>&lt;a</xt> <xa>href</xa>=<xs>'...'</xs>
801    *    <xt>&gt;</xt>text<xt>&lt;/a&gt;</xt></code>) in HTML, this setting defines what to set the inner text to.
802    */
803   protected final AnchorText getUriAnchorText() { return uriAnchorText; }
804
805   @Override
806   public final boolean isAddBeanTypes() { return super.isAddBeanTypes(); }
807
808   /**
809    * Add key/value headers on bean/map tables.
810    *
811    * @see HtmlSerializer.Builder#addKeyValueTableHeaders()
812    * @return
813    *    <jk>true</jk> if <bc>key</bc> and <bc>value</bc> column headers are added to tables.
814    */
815   protected final boolean isAddKeyValueTableHeaders() { return addKeyValueTableHeaders; }
816
817   /**
818    * Look for link labels in URIs.
819    *
820    * @see HtmlSerializer.Builder#disableDetectLabelParameters()
821    * @return
822    *    <jk>true</jk> if we should ook for URL label parameters (e.g. <js>"?label=foobar"</js>).
823    */
824   protected final boolean isDetectLabelParameters() { return detectLabelParameters; }
825
826   /**
827    * Look for URLs in {@link String Strings}.
828    *
829    * @see HtmlSerializer.Builder#disableDetectLinksInStrings()
830    * @return
831    *    <jk>true</jk> if we should automatically convert strings to URLs if they look like a URL.
832    */
833   protected final boolean isDetectLinksInStrings() { return detectLinksInStrings; }
834
835   /**
836    * Serialize the specified object to the specified writer.
837    *
838    * @param out The writer.
839    * @param o The object to serialize.
840    * @param eType The expected type of the object if this is a bean property.
841    * @param name
842    *    The attribute name of this object if this object was a field in a JSON object (i.e. key of a
843    *    {@link Map.Entry} or property name of a bean).
844    * @param pMeta The bean property being serialized, or <jk>null</jk> if we're not serializing a bean property.
845    * @param xIndent The current indentation value.
846    * @param isRoot <jk>true</jk> if this is the root element of the document.
847    * @param nlIfElement <jk>true</jk> if we should add a newline to the output before serializing only if the object is an element and not text.
848    * @return The type of content encountered.  Either simple (no whitespace) or normal (elements with whitespace).
849    * @throws SerializeException Generic serialization error occurred.
850    */
851   
852   @SuppressWarnings({
853      "null", // Null handling verified by context or framework
854      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
855      "java:S107", // Method has many parameters; acceptable for builder/configuration methods
856   })
857   protected ContentResult serializeAnything(XmlWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String name, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, int xIndent, boolean isRoot, boolean nlIfElement)
858      throws SerializeException {
859
860      ClassMeta<?> aType = null;       // The actual type
861      ClassMeta<?> wType = null;     // The wrapped type (delegate)
862      ClassMeta<?> sType;   // The serialized type
863
864      var addJsonTags = isAddJsonTags();
865
866      if (eType == null)
867         eType = object();
868
869      aType = push2(name, o, eType);
870
871      // Handle recursion
872      if (aType == null) {
873         o = null;
874         aType = object();
875      }
876
877      // Handle Optional<X>
878      if (isOptional(aType)) {
879         o = getOptionalValue(o);
880         eType = getOptionalType(eType);
881         aType = getClassMetaForObject(o, object());
882      }
883
884      indent += xIndent;
885
886      ContentResult cr = CR_ELEMENTS;
887
888      // Determine the type.
889      if (o == null || (aType.isChar() && ((Character)o).charValue() == 0)) {
890         if (addJsonTags)
891            out.tag("null");
892         cr = ContentResult.CR_MIXED;
893
894      } else {
895
896         if (aType.isDelegate()) {
897            wType = aType;
898            aType = (ClassMeta)((Delegate)o).getBeanInfo();
899         }
900
901         sType = aType;
902
903         String typeName = null;
904         if (isAddBeanTypes() && ! eType.equals(aType))
905            typeName = aType.getBeanDictionaryName();
906
907         // Swap if necessary
908         ObjectSwap swap = aType.getSwap(this);
909         if (nn(swap)) {
910            o = swap(swap, o);
911            sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
912
913            // If the getSwapClass() method returns Object, we need to figure out
914            // the actual type now.
915            if (sType.isObject())
916               sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
917         }
918
919         // Handle the case where we're serializing a raw stream.
920         if (sType.isReader() || sType.isInputStream()) {
921            pop();
922            indent -= xIndent;
923            if (sType.isReader())
924               pipe((Reader)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
925            else
926               pipe((InputStream)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
927            return ContentResult.CR_MIXED;
928         }
929
930         HtmlClassMeta cHtml = getHtmlClassMeta(sType);
931         HtmlBeanPropertyMeta bpHtml = getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta);
932
933         HtmlRender render = coalesce(bpHtml.getRender(), cHtml.getRender());
934
935         if (nn(render)) {
936            Object o2 = render.getContent(this, o);
937            if (o2 != o) {
938               indent -= xIndent;
939               pop();
940               out.nl(indent);
941               return serializeAnything(out, o2, null, typeName, null, xIndent, false, false);
942            }
943         }
944
945         if (cHtml.isXml() || bpHtml.isXml()) {
946            pop();
947            indent++;
948            if (nlIfElement)
949               out.nl(0);
950            super.serializeAnything(out, o, null, null, null, null, false, XmlFormat.MIXED, false, false, null);
951            indent -= xIndent + 1;
952            return cr;
953
954         } else if (cHtml.isPlainText() || bpHtml.isPlainText()) {
955            out.w(o == null ? "null" : o.toString());
956            cr = CR_MIXED;
957
958         } else if (o == null || (sType.isChar() && ((Character)o).charValue() == 0)) {
959            if (addJsonTags)
960               out.tag("null");
961            cr = CR_MIXED;
962
963         } else if (sType.isBean()) {
964            BeanMap m = toBeanMap(o);
965            if (getAnnotationProvider().has(HtmlLink.class, aType)) {
966               var uriProperty = Holder.<String>empty();
967               var nameProperty = Holder.<String>empty();
968               aType.forEachAnnotation(HtmlLink.class, x -> ine(x.uriProperty()), x -> uriProperty.set(x.uriProperty()));
969               aType.forEachAnnotation(HtmlLink.class, x -> ine(x.nameProperty()), x -> nameProperty.set(x.nameProperty()));
970               Object urlProp = m.get(uriProperty.orElse(""));
971               Object nameProp = m.get(nameProperty.orElse(""));
972
973               out.oTag("a").attrUri("href", urlProp).w('>').text(nameProp).eTag("a");
974               cr = CR_MIXED;
975            } else {
976               out.nlIf(! isRoot, xIndent + 2);
977               serializeBeanMap(out, m, eType, pMeta);
978            }
979
980         } else if (sType.isMap() || (nn(wType) && wType.isMap())) {
981            out.nlIf(! isRoot, xIndent + 1);
982            if (o instanceof BeanMap o2)
983               serializeBeanMap(out, o2, eType, pMeta);
984            else
985               serializeMap(out, (Map)o, sType, eType.getKeyType(), eType.getValueType(), typeName, pMeta);
986
987         } else if (sType.isCollection() || sType.isArray() || (nn(wType) && wType.isCollection())) {
988            out.nlIf(! isRoot, xIndent + 1);
989            serializeCollection(out, o, sType, eType, name, pMeta);
990
991         } else if (sType.isStreamable()) {
992            // HTML must inspect elements to decide table vs. list layout (getTableHeaders), so materialization is unavoidable.
993            out.nlIf(! isRoot, xIndent + 1);
994            var list = toListFromStreamable(o, sType);
995            serializeCollection(out, list, getClassMeta(List.class), eType, name, pMeta);
996
997         } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
998            if (eType.isNumber() && ! (isRoot && addJsonTags))
999               out.append(o);
1000            else
1001               out.sTag("number").append(o).eTag("number");
1002            cr = CR_MIXED;
1003
1004         } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
1005            if (eType.isBoolean() && ! (isRoot && addJsonTags))
1006               out.append(o);
1007            else
1008               out.sTag("boolean").append(o).eTag("boolean");
1009            cr = CR_MIXED;
1010
1011         } else if (isUri(sType, pMeta, o)) {
1012            String label = getAnchorText(pMeta, o);
1013            out.oTag("a").attrUri("href", o).w('>');
1014            out.text(label);
1015            out.eTag("a");
1016            cr = CR_MIXED;
1017
1018         } else if (sType.isDate()) {
1019            String s = serializeDate((Date)o, sType);
1020            if (isRoot && addJsonTags)
1021               out.sTag(CONST_string).text(s).eTag(CONST_string);
1022            else
1023               out.text(s);
1024            cr = CR_MIXED;
1025
1026         } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
1027            String s = serializeCalendar(o, sType);
1028            if (isRoot && addJsonTags)
1029               out.sTag(CONST_string).text(s).eTag(CONST_string);
1030            else
1031               out.text(s);
1032            cr = CR_MIXED;
1033
1034         } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
1035            String s = serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)o, sType);
1036            if (isRoot && addJsonTags)
1037               out.sTag(CONST_string).text(s).eTag(CONST_string);
1038            else
1039               out.text(s);
1040            cr = CR_MIXED;
1041
1042         } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
1043            String s = serializeDuration((Duration)o);
1044            if (isRoot && addJsonTags)
1045               out.sTag(CONST_string).text(s).eTag(CONST_string);
1046            else
1047               out.text(s);
1048            cr = CR_MIXED;
1049
1050         } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
1051            String s = serializePeriod((Period)o);
1052            if (isRoot && addJsonTags)
1053               out.sTag(CONST_string).text(s).eTag(CONST_string);
1054            else
1055               out.text(s);
1056            cr = CR_MIXED;
1057
1058         } else {
1059            if (isRoot && addJsonTags)
1060               out.sTag(CONST_string).text(toString(o)).eTag(CONST_string);
1061            else
1062               out.text(toString(o));
1063            cr = CR_MIXED;
1064         }
1065      }
1066      pop();
1067      indent -= xIndent;
1068      return cr;
1069   }
1070
1071   @Override /* Overridden from XmlSerializerSession */
1072   protected ContentResult serializeAnything(XmlWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String keyName, String elementName, Namespace elementNamespace, boolean addNamespaceUris, XmlFormat format,
1073      boolean isMixed, boolean preserveWhitespace, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
1074
1075      // If this is a bean, then we want to serialize it as HTML unless it's @Html(format=XML).
1076      var type = push2(elementName, o, eType);
1077      pop();
1078
1079      if (type == null)
1080         type = object();
1081      else if (type.isDelegate())
1082         type = (ClassMeta)((Delegate)o).getBeanInfo();
1083      ObjectSwap swap = type.getSwap(this);
1084      if (nn(swap)) {
1085         o = swap(swap, o);
1086         type = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
1087         if (type.isObject())
1088            type = getClassMetaForObject(o);
1089      }
1090
1091      HtmlClassMeta cHtml = getHtmlClassMeta(type);
1092
1093      if (type.isMapOrBean() && ! cHtml.isXml())
1094         return serializeAnything(out, o, eType, elementName, pMeta, 0, false, false);
1095
1096      return super.serializeAnything(out, o, eType, keyName, elementName, elementNamespace, addNamespaceUris, format, isMixed, preserveWhitespace, pMeta);
1097   }
1098}
